violations.text: Observed floor tiles in the walk-in cooler and kitchen area in poor repair. Floors observed with broken tiles/missing tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025

An open employees' beverage container was observed stored in a food preparation area. Employees shall not drink from open beverage containers in order to prevent contamination of their hands, the container, and exposed food. PIC covered container and relocated container to designated area. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025

meatballs were observed held at (123) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC remove meatballs from hot hold and reheated meatballs on stove to 167 degrees fahrenheit. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025

Cole slaw was observed marked with a date that exceeded the 7-day limit for TCS. Cole slaw was marked 8/27/25, the date of this inspection is 9/10/25. The cole slaw was voluntarily disposed of during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of (PIC), (Sausages) were placed at room temp. in the 3-door lowboy in container greater than four inches deep. PIC moved sausage to long shallow sheet pan and placed in walk-in cooler. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025

The pre-flush spray hose at the (2 bay sink) is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2025

Obseved the drain plug for the outside dumpster is missing. Drains in receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must have drain plugs in place. PIC will put in a service order. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025
Observed missing/broken floor tiles in the (walk-in cooler and kicthen) area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC to instruct employees to use the 3 bay sink for proper sanitizing until technician can adjust the unit. Call was made for service at the time of inspection. Technician arrived by end of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2024

The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked with an asterisk. An asterisk is to be provided for food items pertaining to the consumer advisory. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2024

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. A clean pan was supplied for ice scoop storage at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2024

Cleaned and sanitized equipment and utensils were observed not stored inverted and with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, debris, and/or biofilm... - Ice machine - Storage shelving Non-FOOD-CONTACT SURFACES of EQUIPMENT shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to preclude accumulation of soil residues. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2024

The floor in the kitchen area under and behind equipment was observed to have an accumulation of residue/debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2024
